SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.label

Class OriginTermLabelRefactoring

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.label.OriginTermLabelRefactoring
All Implemented Interfaces:
RuleSpecificTask, TermLabelRefactoring
public class OriginTermLabelRefactoring extends Object implements TermLabelRefactoring
Refactoring for OriginTermLabels. This ensures that OriginTermLabel.getSubtermOrigins() always returns an up-to-date value.

  • Nested Class Summary

  • Method Details

    • getSupportedRuleNames

      public ImmutableList<Name> getSupportedRuleNames()
      Description copied from interface: RuleSpecificTask
      Returns the supported rule Names or null or an empty list if all rules are supported.
      Specified by:
      getSupportedRuleNames in interface RuleSpecificTask
      Returns:
      The list of supported rule Names or null/empty list if all rules are supported.

    • defineRefactoringScope

      public TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope defineRefactoringScope(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm)
      Description copied from interface: TermLabelRefactoring
      Defines if a refactoring is required and if so in which TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope.
      Specified by:
      defineRefactoringScope in interface TermLabelRefactoring
      Parameters:
      state - The TermLabelState of the current rule application.
      services - The Services used by the Proof on which a Rule is applied right now.
      applicationPosInOccurrence - The PosInOccurrence in the previous Sequent which defines the JTerm that is rewritten.
      applicationTerm - The JTerm defined by the PosInOccurrence in the previous Sequent.
      rule - The Rule which is applied.
      goal - The optional Goal on which the JTerm to create will be used.
      hint - An optional hint passed from the active rule to describe the term which should be created.
      tacletTerm - The optional taclet JTerm.
      Returns:
      The required TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope.

    • refactorLabels

      public void refactorLabels(TermLabelState state, Services services, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, JTerm applicationTerm, Rule rule, Goal goal, Object hint, JTerm tacletTerm, JTerm term, LabelCollection labels)
      Description copied from interface: TermLabelRefactoring
      This method is used to refactor the labels of the given JTerm.
      Specified by:
      refactorLabels in interface TermLabelRefactoring
      Parameters:
      state - The TermLabelState of the current rule application.
      services - The Services used by the Proof on which a Rule is applied right now.
      applicationPosInOccurrence - The PosInOccurrence in the previous Sequent which defines the JTerm that is rewritten.
      applicationTerm - The JTerm defined by the PosInOccurrence in the previous Sequent.
      rule - The Rule which is applied.
      goal - The optional Goal on which the JTerm to create will be used.
      hint - An optional hint passed from the active rule to describe the term which should be created.
      tacletTerm - The optional taclet JTerm.
      term - The JTerm which is now refactored.
      labels - The new labels the JTerm will have after the refactoring.
